summary: package eu.kalafatic.utils.preferences; import org.eclipse.core.runtime.Platform; import org.eclipse.core.runtime.Plugin; import org.osgi.service.prefs.BackingStoreException; import org.osgi.service.prefs.Preferences; import eu.kalafatic.utils.Activator; public class AppPreferencesUtils { private Preferences preferences; private volatile static AppPreferencesUtils INSTANCE; public AppPreferencesUtils() { preferences = Platform.getPreferencesService().getRootNode().node(Plugin.PLUGIN_PREFERENCE_SCOPE).node(Activator.PLUGIN_ID); preferences.put("extensions", ""); } public static AppPreferencesUtils getInstance() { if (INSTANCE == null) { synchronized (AppPreferencesUtils.class) { INSTANCE = new AppPreferencesUtils();
